headline: Jim Cramer on Fair Isaac: “I Like the Company, But I’m Not Going to Go There”
summary: Fair Isaac Corporation (NYSE:FICO) was among the stocks on Jim Cramer’s radar on Mad Money, as he advised investors to care about where a stock is going, not where it has been. During the lightning round, a caller asked for Cramer’s opinion of the stock. He replied: Okay, this is a company a lot of […]
